code_events.event:
Fired when AI Connect initializes modules. Allows addons to register additional tool modules.

Callback signature:

public static function aiConnectModulesInit(array &$modules, \chgold\AIConnect\Service\Manifest $manifestService)

Arguments:

  1. array &$modules - Array of registered modules, keyed by module ID. Add your module instance here.
  2. \chgold\AIConnect\Service\Manifest $manifestService - The manifest service instance.

Example:

public static function aiConnectModulesInit(array &$modules, \chgold\AIConnect\Service\Manifest $manifestService)
{
	$modules['my-module'] = new \MyAddon\Module\MyModule($manifestService);
}
